description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix strategy to test on multiple Linux distributions (Arch Linux, AlmaLinux 8 and 9, Rocky Linux 8 and 9, Debian 10, 11, and 12, Fedora 37, 38, and rawhide, Ubuntu 20.04, 22.04, and rolling) with Debug build type and GNU compiler. For each job, install Git, checkout code, install dependencies, build and install ckb-next, run ckb-next-daemon --help, package ckb-next, and upload the package as a workflow artifact.
